title: Platinum UK 7 Disc Box set Is there a way to acquire one
display_title: Platinum UK 7 Disc Box set Is there a way to acquire one
wikitext: []: Platinum UK 7-Disc Box set -- Is there a way to acquire one?             Quote Post by eva14 » Sat Oct 11, 2014 1:23 pm I've got all 7 Platinum DVDs of Evangelion but I'm missing the outer box and without it, it kind of looks incomplete sadly so I'm here to ask if anyone would know of a way to purchase one or to make? By 'make' I meant (probably) that someone would scan their outer box (top, sides, bottom), I'd get a box that would hold up all 7 DVDs and then print within the proper measurements. I'd prefer one or the other rather than go with a custom 7-disc DVD fat pack for authenticity.
